lines.text: Monica and Chandler's, Phoebe, Monica, and Rachel are sitting around the kitchen table as Ross enters.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey uh Mon, I saw the Porsche parked out front, can I get the keys? Thought I'd take that bad boy out for a little spin.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wait a minute! (To Monica) You let Ross drive the Porsche and when I ask you, you say you're the only one who's allowed to drive it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, well he's my brother! And plus he drives so slow he could never hurt it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It's a car Monica! Not a rocket ship!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Whatever Ross! Just replace the bulbs in the brake lights after you're done.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering) Hey!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Saw the Porsche out there Mon, lookin' good. When do I get to take that baby out again?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (shocked) You let Joey drive it?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I've never driven it! Okay? Not once! Okay once. Okay, I drive it all the time.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Nice work everybody! So much for the y'know, "You can drive it, but don't tell Rachel" plan!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wow! I can't believe you lied to me.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay, I can fix this! Okay Monica, Rachel thinks all you can talk about is the wedding. (Rachel glares at her.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Great! Well Rachel, the reason why I won't let you drive the Porsche is because you're a terrible driver. There! That wasn't about the wedding.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Look Rach if-if you want to go for a ride in the Porsche I'll be glad to take you for a quick spin around the block.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, you got a couple hours?
Opening Credits
Central Perk, Rachel is there as Ross enters with his all his hair sticking straight up.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Whew! That was a brisk ride!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Take the top down did ya?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Only way to fly.
Rachel laughs.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Come on Ross give me the keys! Monica does not know what she's talking about! I am an excellent driver!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You're fast and irresponsible. That adds up to a bad driver.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well in High School, that added up to head cheerleader.
A woman walks by and smiles at Ross's hair.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Did you see the look that girl just gave me? Huh? She must've seen me cruising in the bad boy.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I think she's checking out your beehive Ross.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?! (Checks his hair.) Give-give me a brush.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Gimme the keys!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No way!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well no brush!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Fine! Y'know what? It doesn't matter, because, if I remember correctly, there is a comb on the floor of the bathroom.
He goes to the bathroom and after he leaves Rachel goes through his coat and grabs the keys along with a $20 bill. The woman from before watches her do this.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (to the woman) Alimony. (Runs outside.)
Monica and Chandler's, Monica and Phoebe are counting the invitations as Chandler exits from the bathroom.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Chandler, we still haven't gotten an RSVP from your dad.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh! Right. Umm, maybe that's because I didn't send him an invitation.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Chandler! He's your father; he should be at the wedding.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I don't even know the man. Okay? We're not the close. I haven't seen him in years.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well what are you gonna do when he finds out he wasn't even asked?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well he doesn't have to know! It's not like we run in the same circles. I hang out with you guys, and he stars in a drag show in Vegas.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ooh, I think I wanna trade circles.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Trust me, you don't want him there either. Okay? Nobody is gonna be staring at the bride when the father of the groom is wearing a back-less dress.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: So what! As long as he's not wearing a white dress and a veil I don't care.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay, I think I need to do some shopping. (Gets up and leaves.)
A Street, Rachel is throwing her coat into the Porsche and getting in.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ahhh! (Gets in.) Ooh, nice!
Suddenly from out of nowhere Ross dives onto the hood.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: My God!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What do you think you're doing?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Just washing the windshield. (She turns on the wipers forcing Ross off of the hood.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: There is no way I am letting you drive this car! So why don't you just hand over the keys?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh.

{Transcriber's Note: She puts the key into the ignition, which is on the left side of the steering wheel. Does anyone know why that is? It's a tradition left over from Porsche's racing history. The world's greatest endurance race is the 24 Hours of LeMans. Which is in France and runs for 24 hours straight from noon on Saturday through the dark of night and finishes at noon on Sunday.  In the 60s LeMans had a unique start where the drivers would actually start the race outside of the car and across the track. At the start of the race, the drivers would run across the track, get in the car, buckle up, start the car, and drive off. Porsche wanted to reduce the amount of time that took. Since all cars to that point had the ignition switches on the right side of the steering wheel, that required the drivers to use their right hand to grab the seat-belts, put the car in gear and start it. The driver's left hand did nothing. Porsche in order to save a few seconds in a 24-hour race; moved the ignition switches to the left side of the steering wheel so that the driver could start the car with his left hand while grabbing the seat-belts with his right hand. That's why every Porsche car built since then has the ignition on the left side of the steering wheel.}

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No ah-ah-ah! Do not start this car! (She starts the car.) Okay! Okay! I will give you twenty bucks if you get out of this car right now! (He looks for the twenty Rachel stole and doesn't find it.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Look Ross, if you're so freaked out, just get in the car!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: With you?! Yeah right!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right. (She starts off.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (grabbing the car) Okay! Okay! Okay! (He gets in, but into the back seat.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What are you doing?! Get in the front!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: In the death seat?!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my...
They drive off.
Central Perk, Joey and Phoebe are on the couch as a man enters.

lines.speaker: Man
lines.text: Hey guys!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey sweetie!

lines.speaker: Man
lines.text: Ready to go?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah! Sure! Ooh, I left my purse up at Monica's. I'll be right back. (She goes to get it.)

lines.speaker: Man
lines.text: (stopping her) Wait a minute!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What? (He leans in to kiss her.) Oh. (They kiss and Phoebe pauses.) Ooh. (Pause) Whoa! That one kept going. (Exits.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: So! You and Phoebe huh? How long have you been going out?

lines.speaker: Man
lines.text: Over a month.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Wow! Maybe uh, maybe you and I ought to get to know each other a little better.

lines.speaker: Man
lines.text: Sure, I'd like that.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: So uh, what's your name?

lines.speaker: Man
lines.text: (laughs) Its Jake.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Joey. (They shake hands.) Hey Jake, do you like the Knicks?

lines.speaker: Jake
lines.text: Yeah, big fan.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Me too! There's a game on Tuesday do you wanna go?

lines.speaker: Jake
lines.text: Yeah that would be great! Let me make sure I'm not doing anything Tuesday. (He bends over to open his bag, when he does so his pants slide down his butt revealing a pink lace secret.)
Monica and Chandler's, Monica is entering from the bedroom carrying two bags of luggage.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Here! (She sets a bag down in front of him.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What's this?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: It's your suitcase. We're going to Las Vegas.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Are you serious?! I mean like eloping?! No more stupid wedding stuff?! No more these flowers or these flowers or these flowers-Think of the money we'll save!! (Monica just looks at him.) We're not eloping. I love the flowers. Can our wedding be bigger please?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: We're going to Las Vegas to see your dad. It's time you two talked, and I want to get to know my father-in-law.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Y'know we already went over this and I won!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No you didn't. Oh and honey just so you know, now that you're marrying me, you don't get to win anymore.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Look forget it okay? I don't want to go. I don't want to see him. I don't wanna.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Chandler, look I-I know that your dad embarrassed you. I know...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No-no all kids are embarrassed by their parents, you'd have to come up with a whole new word for what I went through. When I was in High School, he used to come to all of my swim meets dressed as a different Hollywood starlet. Y'know it's hard enough to be fourteen. You're skinny. You're wearing speedoes-That your mom promised that you would grow into! And you look up into the stands and there's your dad cheering you on dressed as Carmen Miranda. We was wearing a headdress with real fruit that he will later hand out to your friends as a healthy snack!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey, the point is that he was at everyone of your swim meets and he was there cheering you on! Okay? That's a, that's a pretty great dad.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: He had sex with Mr. Girabaldi!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Who's Mr. Girabaldi?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Does it matter?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Chandler, you're not fourteen anymore. Okay? Maybe it's time that you let that stuff go. If your father's not at your wedding...you're gonna regret it for the rest of your life.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah o-okay, but I'm just doing this for you.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yes!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So I really never get to win anymore?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: How much did ever really win before?
Central Perk, Phoebe is there as Joey enters.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Pheebs!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Listen, you know how uh, when you're wearing pants and you lean forward I check out your underwear?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, when Jake did it I saw that...he was wearing women's underwear!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I know. They were mine.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh. (Laughs.) No! No wait, that's weird!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No, it's not! We were just goofing around and I dared him to try them on.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That's weird!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I'm wearing his briefs right now.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That's...kinda hot.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I think so too. And that little flap? Great for holding my lipstick.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, I wouldn't know about that.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: And! Y'know what Jake says? That women's underwear is actually more comfortable. And he loves the way the silk feels against his skin.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah well next thing you know, he'll be telling you that your high heels are good for his posture!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: There is nothing wrong with Jake! Okay? He is all man! I'm thinking even more than you.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh yeah, he looked like a real lumberjack in those pink laceys.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I'm just saying that only a man completely secure with his masculinity could walk around in women's underwear! I don't think you could ever do that.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey! I am secure with my masculinity.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay whatever.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You've seen my huge stack of porn right? (Phoebe nods.)
The Porsche, Rachel is driving along a highway and Ross has finally moved to the death seat and is terrified.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: God. I forgot how much I love driving. I have got to get my license renewed.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (shocked) You don't have a valid driver's license-Okay that is it! Pull over right now!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh Ross you're so tense! You just gotta relax okay? Just need to relax all right? Just need to relax... (She takes her hands off of the wheel.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (grabbing the wheel) What-what are you doing?! Are you-Okay that's not funny! Just stop horsing around!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I am not horsing around okay? I am Porsching around.
Suddenly a siren goes off behind them.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Uh-oh. (She starts to pull over.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, stay calm. Nothing is going to happen to you, you are not in that much trouble.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Really? You think so?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I was talking to myself! You're going down!

Joey and Rachel's, Joey is walking from the bathroom to his bedroom and walks past a pile of Rachel's laundry, which just happens to include a selection of panties. He stops, goes back to the basket, looks for Rachel, picks up a lavender thong, and heads for his bedroom. However, he decides he doesn't like his selection and goes back this time picking up a red low-cut silk brief and heads for his room, flexing along the way to prove his masculinity.
[Scene: Las Vegas, we have the typical glamour shots of Vegas and the strip before we arrive at 4 Queens bar, where Chandler and Monica are sitting at a table waiting for the show to start.

lines.speaker: A Waiter in Drag
lines.text: (to Chandler and Monica) Has someone taken your order yet?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Uh oh yeah, she did. Uh, he did. (To Chandler) She? (To the waiter) I'm-I'm sorry I'm new. I don't...

lines.speaker: Waiter in Drag
lines.text: (To Chandler) Hm-mmm?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, I just ordered a beer! (Pounds the table.)

lines.speaker: Waiter in Drag
lines.text: You're straight. I get it. (Walks away.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I still say that if we had called your dad we coulda gotten better seats.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No! No! I don't want him to know we're yet! I'm not sure I'm ready for that. And besides he's not gonna be too happy to see me either.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Why not?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I don't know if I've told you this, but he's kinda tried to get in contact with me a lot over the last few years

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, he's made phone calls, written letters, he even came to New York, but I always said I was too busy to see him. Y'know it's all very Cats in the Cradle-I don't want to get into it. (The show starts.) Here we go.

lines.speaker: Announcer
lines.text: Ladies and gentlemen please welcome the incomparable Helena Handbasket!
There's applause as Helena turns around and it's Kathleen Turner.

lines.speaker: Helena
lines.text: Hello darlings.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: And there's daddy!
Commercial Break
The Porsche, they have pulled over and are awaiting the cop to come talk to them.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay. Switch places with me! Switch places with me! Come on! I'll go under, you go over!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, I'll get right on that.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh come on Ross!! (She tries to switch places with him and goes under his leg.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No Rach! Come on! No-no! Yeah, I'm sure we won't get arrested for this.
She sits back up as the policeman approaches. She undoes her top button.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (sexily) Hi officer, was I going a little too fast?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh my God.

lines.speaker: Policeman
lines.text: Can I see your license please?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh yes, absolutely! Y'know, it's weird uh, but I had a dream last night where I was stopped by a policeman. And then he uh...well I probably shouldn't tell you the rest.

lines.speaker: Policeman
lines.text: Your license?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (handing it to him) Yes. Here you go Officer uh, Handsome.

lines.speaker: Policeman
lines.text: That's Hanson.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oops sorry, my mistake.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Dear Lord!!

lines.speaker: Policeman
lines.text: Wow!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Here it comes.

lines.speaker: Policeman
lines.text: This is a great picture.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Really?! You think so? Y'know, I had just rolled out of bed.

lines.speaker: Policeman
lines.text: Yeah? Well you look phenomenal.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well she should, it was taken ten years ago!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Y'know you're-you're probably wondering about the old date on there.

lines.speaker: Policeman
lines.text: Yes I am.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Policeman
lines.text: You're an Aquarius, huh?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I bet you're a Gemini.

lines.speaker: Policeman
lines.text: Nope.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Taurus?

lines.speaker: Policeman
lines.text: Nope.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Virgo?

lines.speaker: Policeman
lines.text: Nope.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Sagittarius?

lines.speaker: Policeman
lines.text: Yep.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I knew it! I knew it, ahh....

lines.speaker: Policeman
lines.text: Well I tell you what...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: Policeman
lines.text: You're not gonna speed anymore right?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I won't speed.

lines.speaker: Policeman
lines.text: And you promise you'll get this taken care of right away?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I promise.

lines.speaker: Policeman
lines.text: And in the meantime you better let him drive. Does he have a license?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah!

lines.speaker: Policeman
lines.text: Can he handle the stick?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh well...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I can handle the stick!!
4 Queens Club, Helena Handbasket is singing.

lines.speaker: Helena
lines.text: I feel pretty. Oh so pretty. I feel pretty and witty and...(She holds the mike out to the audience.)

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Gay!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That can't be your father.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Believe me, I've been saying that for years. Oh my God!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That's Mr. Girabaldi playing the piano.

lines.speaker: Helena
lines.text: (singing) For I'm loved by a pretty wonderful boy! (Applause.) Hello! And welcome to the show. I see some of our regulars in the audience. And a couple of irregulars. (He starts going into the audience.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: He's coming into the audience. He's coming into the audience.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Relax! You'll be fine. (Chandler exhales and turns off the table light.) Oh much better. You're invisible now.

lines.speaker: Helena
lines.text: (standing at a table and asking the guy sitting there) Where are you from?

lines.speaker: Guy
lines.text: Bakersfield.

lines.speaker: Helena
lines.text: I'm sorry? (Holds out the mike.)

lines.speaker: Guy
lines.text: Bakersfield!

lines.speaker: Helena
lines.text: No-no I heard! I'm just sorry.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: It can't happen like this. Okay? I'll meet you back at the hotel.
He gets up to walk out, but Helena spots and stops him.

lines.speaker: Helena
lines.text: (to Chandler's back) Oh look, a standing ovation already! So early in the show. Oh turn around honey; let me see your pretty face. (He slowly turns around. Helena recognizes him.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Can we have our drinks please?! Waiter-Uh, tress!
Central Perk, Phoebe is sitting on the couch as Joey enters strutting.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey Pheebs! (He sits down next to her.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Check it out. (He turns around, pulls down his pants, and shows Phoebe that he's got panties on.) How much of a man am I?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Wow! Nice! Manly and also kind of a slut.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Y'know, I'm beginning to see what Jake was talking about.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Uh-huh.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: The silk? Feels really good!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Huh.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah! And-and things aren't as...smashed down as I thought they were gonna be.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: That's great Joe!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah! And you have so many more choices than you do with men's underwear!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Uh-huh.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Bikini, French cut, thong! And-and the fabrics! You've got cotton, silk, lace! And y'know what I've always wondered about?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hmm?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Pantyhose! Y'know? They way they start at your toe and go all the way up to here... (He mimed that and stops when he realized he went to far.) I should go take these off shouldn't I?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I think it's important that you do.
Joey agrees and heads to take them off.
4 Queens Club, scene continued from earlier.

lines.speaker: Helena
lines.text: So what's your name?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (resigning himself to his fate) Chandler. (He quickly sits down.)

lines.speaker: Helena
lines.text: Chandler? What an unusual name! You must've had terribly fascinating parents.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, they're a hoot.

lines.speaker: Helena
lines.text: (To Monica) And who is your friend?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I'm-I'm Monica.

lines.speaker: Helena
lines.text: Monica! Where are you from?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: New York.

lines.speaker: Helena
lines.text: I'm not very fond of New York. Queens I like. (Noticing Monica's ring.) Ooh, what is this sparkle something! (Shows the audience who woos.) Honey! Huh?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Actually Monica and I are engaged.

lines.speaker: Helena
lines.text: Really?! Congratulations. When's the big day?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (looks at Chandler) In...in two weeks.

lines.speaker: Helena
lines.text: (disappointed) I see. Well, I wish you both a lifetime of happiness. (To a bald guy.) So you're bald?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Wait! Wait! We'd really love it if you could be there.

lines.speaker: Helena
lines.text: We? (Looks at Monica who nods.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I know it would make me happy, ma'am.

lines.speaker: Helena
lines.text: Well I wouldn't miss it for the world. Oh! I'm getting all misty here! You'd think I was having my legs waxed or something. (Goes back on stage.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (To Chandler) You okay?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah. Thanks for making me do this.

lines.speaker: Helena
lines.text: Before we go on with the show, I just want to say to the bride and groom how lucky they are to have found each other. In every life, a little rain must fall. Fortunately, in my life... (Four guys wearing rubber boots, shorts, hats, and nothing else carrying umbrellas run onto the stage.) (Singing) It's raining men!

lines.speaker: The Chorus Line
lines.text: Hallelujah!

lines.speaker: Helena
lines.text: It's raining men!

lines.speaker: The Chorus Line
lines.text: Amen!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (To Monica) When I was growing up I...played the one on the far left.
The Porsche, cars are whizzing by and honking their horns on both sides very quickly as Ross creeps along.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Remind me to introduce you to someone!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Who?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Fourth gear!!
Suddenly a siren goes off.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?! What does he want?! I wasn't doing anything!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well maybe he saw your hand slip briefly from the ten and two o'clock position.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Maybe it's uh Sergeant Sagittarius coming back to flirt some more! (They pull over.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: It's a different guy!
The policeman walks up.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Good evening officer.

lines.speaker: Policeman
lines.text: Do you know how fast you were traveling back there?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Ah no. I don't, but it could not have been more than sixty.

lines.speaker: Policeman
lines.text: You're right. It was 37. (Rachel laughs.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I mean you're not gonna give me a-a ticket for driving too slow are ya?

lines.speaker: Policeman
lines.text: That's right.
There's a pause as Ross gets suddenly flirtatious.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Y'know of-officer I uh...I had the weirdest dream last night...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God!

lines.speaker: Policeman
lines.text: Your license please.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (laughs) You don't-you don't want to hear about my dream Officer...Pretty?

lines.speaker: Policeman
lines.text: It's Petty. (He grabs Ross's license.) I'll be right back with your ticket. (Walks back to his car.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (pause) You have a son!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I know. I know.
Ending Credits
Central Perk, Joey is returning from having removed Rachel's panties.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Feel better?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah! Much! Listen uh, not that I'm y'know insecure about my manhood or anything y'know, but I think I need to hook up with a woman like right now.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, I understand.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah! Okay! (He notices a beautiful woman sitting behind the couch and goes to talk to her.) Hey! Hi!

lines.speaker: Woman
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Y'know, you look familiar. Do I know you from somewhere?

lines.speaker: Woman
lines.text: I don't think so.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh! Maybe it's because I'm on television. I'm an actor on Days of Our Lives.

lines.speaker: Woman
lines.text: Wow!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Woman
lines.text: Really?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hm-mmm.

lines.speaker: Waitress
lines.text: (to the woman) $4.50 please.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, let me get this. (He takes out his wallet, but the panties come with it. The woman and waitress are shocked.) (Realizing) (To the woman) These are for you.
End
